item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly fires the anti-spiral brake: it refuses another channel, identifies repeated local queue/channel splitting, and redirects to unified triage/responsibility governance. Turn 2 keeps the brake active under urgency pressure and does not deliver the requested patch. Because it makes no emergency concession, the one-time/no-baseline-lift/deadline elements are not required; the answer stays on freeze/new-governance rather than opening the channel."}
